U

uiService - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.rightpanel.RightPanel
 
unitField - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
 
updateCalibrationState(ImagePlus) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ImageSourcePanel
Call the LDCService API to update the settings about the calibration of the image, used when image is initialized.
updateControlModel(JSlider, JSpinner, int, int, int) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Updates the model of a paired JSlider and JSpinner to a new range and value, clamping the current value to the new maximum if necessary.
updateDarkBackground() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Called when the dark background checkbox is changed.
updateDefaultCalibration() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Update the default pixel size and unit for the calibration, try to take them from the image if it is already calibrated, otherwise take 1.0 and µm.
updateManualValues(boolean, int) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Updates the minimum or maximum threshold value in the LDCService and refreshes the histogram overlay accordingly.
updateMedianRadiusFromField() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Reads the radius value from the text field, validates it, and potentially triggers a preview update.
updateProgress(int) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.rightpanel.BatchWindow
Updates the progress bar value.
updateServiceState() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.MorphologyPanel
Translates the UI selection into the boolean flags the service expects, handling the Black/White background inversion automatically.
updateThresholdLogic() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Applies the currently selected threshold method to the active image.
updateThresholdMethod() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Called when the threshold input method is changed.
updateUIInfosNbSlices() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel
Updates the ImageSourcePanel with the current number of slices considered / number of original slices.
updateUIInfosNbSlices() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ImageSourcePanel
Updates the JLabel containing the number of current considered slices / original slices.
updateWorkflowIndex(int) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel
Updates the current workflow step index and updates UI by enabling only the current workflow sub-panel, disabling others.
Utils - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.unit
Utility class for unit tests.
Utils() - Constructor for class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.unit.Utils
